common.change_password_hint: Please change your password at your earliest convenience after logging in.

confirmation.subject: Appointment Confirmation: {{serviceName}} with {{businessName}}
confirmation.message: Your appointment has been successfully confirmed with {{businessName}}.

cancellation.subject: Appointment Cancelled - {{businessName}}
cancellation.book_new: If you wish to book a new appointment, please visit our portal.

invitation.subject: Invitation to join the team!
invitation.message: You have been invited to join the team at {{businessName}}.

otp.subject: Your One-Time Password (AppointDI®)
otp.message: Use the following code for one-time access to your profile:
otp.validity: The code is valid for 10 minutes. If you did not request this code, please ignore this email.

authorized.subject: Payment – amount authorized for {{serviceName}}
authorized.message: A pre-authorization of the amount for the service {{serviceName}} has been performed.
authorized.details: The amount {{amount}} {{currency}} is temporarily blocked on your card.
authorized.hint: Once the staff approves the appointment, the amount will be captured. If the request is denied, the blocked limit will be released automatically.

captured.subject: Payment successful – {{serviceName}}
captured.message: The payment for the service {{serviceName}} was successfully processed.

refunded.subject: Refund processed – {{serviceName}}
refunded.message: The amount for the service {{serviceName}} has been refunded.
refunded.hint: Please note that it may take a few days for your bank statement to reflect the change.

email_changed_new.subject: Your Email Has Been Changed - New Login Details
email_changed_new.message: Your email address in the {{businessName}} system has been changed.

email_changed_old.subject: Your Account Has Been Deactivated
email_changed_old.message: Your email address in the {{businessName}} system has been changed to {{newEmail}}.
email_changed_old.security_note: The account associated with this email address ({{oldEmail}}) is no longer active. If you did not make this change, please contact your manager immediately.

expiration_warning.subject: Your plan {{planName}} will expire soon!
expiration_warning.message: This is a reminder that your subscription plan {{planName}} for business {{businessName}} is expiring.
expiration_warning.hint: To continue using our services without interruption, please renew your subscription before this date. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us.
